etymology.description: й«џ(й«џ) (biДЃo, "hair") + иЂі(иЂі) (Д›r, "ear") = hair by the ears -> hair, beard
etymology.interpretation: The character й«µ combines the semantic element й«џ(й«џ) (biДЃo, "hair") with the phonetic element иЂі(иЂі) (Д›r, "ear") to signify hair or beards, especially as they relate to the sides near the ears.
